priority_basis: Immediate successor to R-024: harden the new raw JSON ingestion boundary against resource-exhaustion ambiguity before broader integration or differential fuzzing.
action: Add deterministic UTF-8 byte-size and structural nesting-depth limits to strict JSON evidence ingestion.
finding: RFC 8259 permits implementations to bound accepted text size and maximum nesting depth; evidence ingestion should make those limits explicit and testable rather than inheriting runtime-dependent failure behavior.
verification: 7 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical implementation and dependency copies; repository-wide CI remains pending.
uncertainty: The selected defaults are local policy choices and may require tuning from production evidence-size distributions.
falsification_route: Attempt boundary, over-boundary, multibyte, mixed-container, and duplicate-member cases; any accepted over-limit input or rejected valid boundary input falsifies the gate.
handoff: Integrate the bounded parser at every raw JSON evidence-ingestion boundary, then run the planned differential-fuzz harness below the same explicit limits.
